description: PERFORM VARYING with TEST AFTER — body executes one extra time vs TEST BEFORE
notes: WITH TEST AFTER: body executes THEN condition is checked. So body runs for X=1,2,3,4. At X=4, body executes, then X>3 is true, loop exits. Count=4. Without TEST AFTER (default TEST BEFORE), body runs for X=1,2,3 only (count=3). This off-by-one is a classic migration bug that causes incorrect bank interest calculations.
